prevalence.source: Eating disorder epidemiology syntheses + Indian clinical reports

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria with medical assessment of malnutrition; careful differentiation from cultural dieting and medical causes of weight loss

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to limited specialist multidisciplinary programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis concentrated in tertiary psychiatry and adolescent medicine in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Nutritional rehabilitation, psychotherapy (family-based approaches), and medical monitoring; inpatient stabilization for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underdiagnosis, stigma, and limited specialized eating disorder services
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing mental health services in major cities and increasing awareness among adolescents
